prestazioni: 1UR-FE 4.6L V8 engine (301hp stock) upgraded with a Magnuson TVS2300 Supercharger (8psi boost, 450whp) paired with a custom AEM V2 water-methanol injection system (50/50 mix) to suppress detonation and cool intake temps

Full bolt-on exhaust system: custom 3.5" stainless steel headers (JBA Performance) merging into a Borla Atak cat-back with 4.5" dual outlets, bypassing the stock resonator for aggressive V8 tone while retaining OEM catalytic converters for emissions compliance

Suspension overhaul with King Shocks 2.5" Remote Reservoir Coilovers (8-way adjustable compression, 24-way rebound) paired with Icon Vehicle Dynamics 1.5" Extended Travel UCAs/LCA for 35" tire clearance, complemented by a TeraFlex JK HD Anti-Rock front sway bar for articulation retention
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody kit (GX460-specific, 3-piece fender flares with carbon fiber weave) paired with a custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap (218-121) and exposed rivets for an overland-meets-JDM aesthetic

OEM+ front end refresh with a TRD Pro grille (blacked-out mesh) and Morimoto XB LED headlights (5500K, sequential turn signals) with Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro LED fog lights (3000-lumen output, amber lens delete)

Rear cargo area transformation: custom aluminum flatbed (Prinsu Designs) with integrated RotopaX 2x7gal fuel/water mounts, ARB twin air compressors, and a hidden Warn Zeon 10-S winch (synthetic rope, hawse fairlead) behind a custom 3D-printed Lexus emblem cover
